title: polystichum lachenense
intro: Polystichum lachenense, also known as the Lachenal's fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polystichum lachenense include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate cough and respiratory issues, and aid in digestion. Polystichum lachenense can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
